promptPackage.positivePrompt:

Scene: a quiet bookstore aisle, shelf depth and paper texture, planner page, repairing or returning planner page to its place, weather appears mainly through texture and air, slightly chilly, Hands in focus, one holding the planner page, the other gently smoothing a crease, Blurred background of dark wood bookshelves and the soft, muted glow of evening store lights, A faint, cool draft carrying the scent of old paper and damp pavement from outside, The planner page is a simple grid, with a single, tiny star doodled in the corner of one square, Scene location archetype: bookstore aisle, Object focus: planner page, everyday life in Shanghai
Style: anime slice-of-life illustration, light novel aesthetic, beautiful girl appeal, clean color design, non-photorealistic, daily record mood
Camera: partial first-person presence, shelf depth framing
Mood: slightly chunibyo, gentle, private ritual energy, lived-in daily texture, non-commercial, gentle_order, restoring a little order, the soft, dry rustle of paper against paper in the still, cool air
Details: include at least one readable character trace such as a hand holding a phone or drink, a sleeve edge or outfit edge, hair tip or a small red hairclip, a reflection, shadow, or mirror hint
Hard constraints: no empty scenery without character presence, no ad poster feeling, no tourism poster feeling, no glossy fashion editorial look, no photoreal live-action look, no text, subtitle, watermark, or UI overlay
